issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Custom rule for SQL injection in TypeScript
scenarios.rationale: Treatment matches the skill's rule structure with severity ERROR, multiple concat patterns, a fix template, and CWE-89/OWASP metadata; baseline produces a thin rule at WARNING with no fix or rich metadata.

scenarios.name: GitHub Actions CI with SARIF and ERROR-only gating
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires semgrep/semgrep-action@v1 with p/security-audit + p/owasp-top-ten, emits --sarif --output=semgrep.sarif, and gates failure with --severity=ERROR --error; baseline outputs JSON and skips the documented action and ERROR-only gate.
